concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types for the canonical MVVM harness.
concept.cypher: MATCH (packageNode:Package)-[:CONTAINS]->(type:Java:Type) WHERE packageNode.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.[^.]+(\\..*)?' WITH packageNode, type, split(packageNode.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType, type.component = segments[2], type.bucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) = 3 THEN 'ROOT' WHEN segments[3] IN ['assembly', 'api', 'View', 'ViewModel', 'Model', 'Controller', 'interactor'] THEN segments[3] ELSE 'OTHER' END, type.relativePath = replace(packageNode.fqn, '.', '/') + '/' + coalesce(type.sourceFileName, type.name + '.java') RETURN type AS MvvmViewType
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.bucket = 'ROOT' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'ViewContribution' SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint RETURN type AS MvvmRootEntrypoint

constraint.description: Canonical MVVM topology allows only assembly, api, View, and ViewModel below each component.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.bucket = 'OTHER' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/<component>/{assembly,api,View,ViewModel}' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Unbekanntes Bucket ausserhalb der kanonischen MVVM-Topologie.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Legacy buckets are migration debt and must disappear from the canonical topology.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.bucket IN ['Model', 'Controller', 'interactor'] RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'assembly/api/View/ViewModel' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Legacy-Bucket in der kanonischen MVVM-Topologie. Verschiebe die Verantwortung in die neuen Buckets.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Component roots may only host *ViewContribution classes.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.bucket = 'ROOT' AND NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' AND NOT type.name ENDS WITH 'ViewContribution' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/<component>/<Component>ViewContribution.java' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Root-Typen ausserhalb des Shell-Entrypoints gehoeren in Buckets.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE (type.name ENDS WITH 'Assembly' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'ShellAdapter') AND type.bucket <> 'assembly' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/<component>/assembly/**' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Assembly- und Shell-Adapter-Typen muessen im assembly-Bucket leben.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Every component requires exactly one root entrypoint.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WITH DISTINCT type.component AS component OPTIONAL MATCH (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint {component: component}) WITH component, collect(DISTINCT root.name) AS roots WHERE size(roots) <> 1 RETURN 'src/view/' + component AS Source, '1x <Component>ViewContribution' AS ExpectedDirection, coalesce(reduce(actual = '', rootName IN roots | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN rootName ELSE actual + ', ' + rootName END), '(none)') AS ActualDirection, 'Jede View-Komponente hat genau einen Shell-Entrypoint.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Cross-component view reuse may only happen through foreign api packages.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE source <> target AND source.component <> target.component AND target.bucket <> 'api' RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'Komponente -> fremdes api/' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Komponentenuebergreifende View-Wiederverwendung darf nur ueber api/ laufen.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
